meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Solve Project Stalls
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on freelance projects. Learn an advanced workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster, impress clients, and finish every build.
content.answer_block: The root cause of project stalls is lack of architectural momentum. By integrating Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for autonomous feature implementation, you transform a manual slog into a streamlined, automated pipeline. This workflow enforces modularity, reduces cognitive load, and ensures you ship production-ready code before burnout strikes.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a half-finished repository, the client’s deadline looming like a storm front, and the code feels like it’s fighting back. You know the architecture, you know the stack, but the 'last mile' of development has become a graveyard of abandoned features and broken promises. This isn't a lack of talent; it's a failure of workflow.

True engineering velocity isn't about typing faster; it's about removing the friction between your intent and the compiler. By leveraging Antigravity to define your domain models and Claude Code to handle the boilerplate, you reclaim your agency. It’s time to stop fighting your own codebase and start shipping like a senior architect.

steps.title: Domain Modeling with Antigravity
steps.description: Establish a single source of truth for your data structures to prevent scope creep.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, scalable schema for a SaaS user-management system including roles, subscription tiers, and audit logs. Use TypeScript interfaces.
steps.claude_code_command: claude read schema.ts --task 'Implement the database migration scripts based on these interfaces.'

steps.title: Automated Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scaffold the API layer based on your finalized schema.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a boilerplate service layer for the defined user-management schema, including CRUD operations and error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate the API routes and service controllers in the src/services directory.'

steps.title: Test-Driven Feature Injection
steps.description: Force quality control by having Claude write tests before implementation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write unit tests for the authentication module covering edge cases like session expiry and invalid token formats.

steps.title: State Management Synchronization
steps.description: Keep your frontend and backend in sync using automated state definitions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Map the backend API response types to Redux/Zustand store slices for efficient frontend state management.

steps.title: Final Production Refactoring
steps.description: Perform a final pass to optimize performance and remove technical debt.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for performance bottlenecks and suggest refactors for O(n) complexity improvements.

pro_tips: Treat your prompts as code; version control your Antigravity prompt library to ensure repeatable builds across different clients.
Use Claude Code's 'read' command on documentation files before starting a new feature to ensure context-aware code generation.
Always force a 'docstring-first' approach in your prompts to ensure your codebase is self-documenting for the client.
Leverage the 'diff' output from Claude Code to manually verify critical security logic rather than blind acceptance.
Automate your commit messages using the 'git-hook' integration within your environment to keep your history clean for client audits.
content.next_steps: After completing this workflow, audit your current project files to identify which modules can be extracted into a reusable private library for future client work.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting incomplete projects dictate your reputation. Master the tools that elite developers use to deliver at scale. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
